name: Penne from Heaven
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to directions on the package; drain.
2. While the pasta is cooking, heat the oil over medium-high heat in a 3-quart saucepan.
3. Add the onion and garlic, and cook, stirring until softened.
4. Add the tomato, water, salt, and sugar. Cook, stirring often for 10 minutes.
5. Add the broccoli, zucchini, sugar snaps, carrot, and parsley. Cook, stirring until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
6. Stir in the Parmesan.
7. Serve over the pasta.
